title: Claude Code Skills Pack: Database Migration — 5 Skills for Safe Schema Changes in Production
description: For backend engineers and DBAs, this pack automates migration script generation, rollback planning, pre-flight validation, zero-downtime column renaming, and post-migration verification so they can ship schema changes confidently without data loss or downtime incidents.
gumroad_description:
Schema changes in production are risky. This pack makes them routine.

Who this is for:
— Backend engineers who've shipped a migration that caused downtime
— DBAs managing high-traffic databases where zero-downtime is non-negotiable
— Leads who want a repeatable process for every schema change, not one-off heroics

What's inside:
— Skill 1: Migration script generator with reversible structure
— Skill 2: Rollback plan writer
— Skill 3: Pre-flight validation checker
— Skill 4: Zero-downtime column rename handler
— Skill 5: Post-migration verification report
— Installation guide + quick-reference trigger table

Schema changes without incidents. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
